289 I2900_DM_CD I2900_DM_CD I2900 Active Diagnoses: Diabetes Mellitus (DM) Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an active diagnosis of diabetes mellitus (e.g., diabetic retinopathy, nephropathy and neuropathy) in the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
